title: vitis tenuicaulis
intro: Vitis tenuicaulis is a type of plant species, scientifically known as a grapevine that is native to China and is also referred to as the "Chinese grapevine". The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids that exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Vitis tenuicaulis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Vitis tenuicaulis can be prepared as a tea, extract, or capsule, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as an ingredient in various herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions.
